vikriti.imbalance: Vata-Kapha aggravation with secondary Pitta involvement

reasoning: Prakriti leans Vata-Kapha due to lifelong tendencies toward irregularity, heaviness, and congestion (Kapha traits) with anxiety and restlessness (Vata traits). Vikriti shows elevated Vata (anxiety, insomnia, irregular digestion) and Kapha (bloating, congestion, weight gain) with mild Pitta involvement (low motivation, preference for warm/oily foods). Chronic cough with phlegm and joint stiffness further support Kapha dominance in imbalance.
